title: Assault company
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{MilitaryUnit |image=[[File:AssaultCompany-IS.png]] |name=Assault company |type=[[Infantry/Legends|Infantry]]''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]'' |formation=[[Company/Legends|Company]] |commander=[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] |second=[[Company lieutenant]] (SC1) |staff=*[[Logistics officer/Legends|Logistics officer]] (SC2) *[[Medical officer]] (SC3) *[[Technical officer]] (SC4) |subunit=Standard: *2 [[assault platoon]]s *2 [[line platoon]]s Augmented: *4 assault platoons[[Imperial Sourcebook (Second Edition)|''Imperial Sourcebook'', Second Edition]] *4 line platoons |strength=180-198 |vehicles= |headquarters= |location= |battles= |formed= |founded= |fragmented= |reorganized= |dissolved= |restored= |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] *Imperial Army }} An '''assault company''', otherwise known as a '''heavy weapons company''', was a formation of the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]]. ==Organization== Assault companies were comprised of two [[assault platoon]]s, two [[line platoon]]s, along with command and support elements. The manpower of an assault company was between 152 to 170 [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] depending on the configuration of the individual assault platoons, with command/support elements bringing the number up to between 180 to 198 in total. Line platoons assigned to an assault company were equipped with [[Light repeating blaster/Legends|light repeating blasters]]. Assault companies could be augmented by the addition of a further two [[assault platoon]]s, and two [[line platoon]]s. ==Order of Battle organizational chart==
[[File:Assault_company_organization.jpg|500px]]
Assault company organizational chart on the Imperial Army Order of Battle
==Appearances== *{{JournalCite|6|The Cure|reprint=1}} ==Sources== *''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]'' *[[Imperial Sourcebook (Second Edition)|''Imperial Sourcebook'', Second Edition]] *''[[Star Wars: Imperial Handbook: A Commander's Guide]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Imperial Army organizational companies]]
